page_content: ENES462 Marketing High-Technology Products and Innovations (3 Credits) Examines the opportunities and challenges of marketing high-technology products in turbulent environments requiring rapid decision making with incomplete information. Explores how innovations are introduced at frequent intervals, research-and-development spending is vital, and there are high mortality rates for both products and businesses. Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Maryland Technology Enterprise Institute. Additional Information: Course may not be used to fulﬁll any BMGT major or minor program requirement.
